_comment: C2 profile fixture — ownership_model flip cascade (R-5/R-6 fixture spec). Tests that when ownership_model changes from 'all_managed_for_others' to 'all_self_owned', the entire owners branch collapses out of the in-scope slot set — the key cascade scenario.
_cascade_note: When ownership_model flips to all_self_owned: 'owners' slot must NOT appear in the in-scope set. Its depends_on guard ('ownership_model in [all_managed_for_others, mixed]') is not satisfied. 'owners_csv' likewise must collapse. Any child slots that depend on 'owners is recorded' must also collapse. This is the cascade that R-5/R-6 requires the resolver to handle correctly — the SAR denominator must shrink accordingly.
